title: Inconsistent Parameter resolution in generate block
body:
I'm showing two failing code and two passing codes. Only the generate block is different in each case.

### Failing Code 1

Here `if` condition is inside `always_comb`

```systemverilog
module t();

    localparam D_WIDTH = 16;
    logic [D_WIDTH-1:0] a, b, c;

    generate
        always_comb begin
            if (D_WIDTH > 2*D_WIDTH) begin
                {a, b} = c[2*D_WIDTH-1:0];
            end
        end
    endgenerate

endmodule
```

### Error
```
verilator -cc --exe -Mdir sim_build -DCOCOTB_SIM=1 --top-module t --vpi --public-flat-rw --prefix Vtop -o t -LDFLAGS "-L `dirname /home/nndurj/Dev/OpenSource/cocotb_test/tests/build/libs/x86_64/libvpi.so` -lvpi -lgpi -lcocotb -lgpilog -lcocotbutils"  /home/nndurj/Dev/OpenSource/cocotb_test/tests/../hdl/test.v /home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb/lib/python3.7/site-packages/cocotb/share/lib/verilator/verilator.cpp
%Error: /home/nndurj/Dev/OpenSource/cocotb_test/tests/../hdl/test.v:9: Extracting 32 bits from only 16 bit number
                                                                     : ... In instance t
                {a, b} = c[2*D_WIDTH-1:0];
                          ^
%Warning-SELRANGE: /home/nndurj/Dev/OpenSource/cocotb_test/tests/../hdl/test.v:9: Selection index out of range: 31:0 outside 15:0
                                                                                : ... In instance t
                {a, b} = c[2*D_WIDTH-1:0];
                          ^
                   ... Use "/* verilator lint_off SELRANGE */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s), 1 warning(s)

```

### Passing Code 1

Here `if` condition is outside of `always_comb`

```systemverilog
module t();

    localparam D_WIDTH = 16;
    logic [D_WIDTH-1:0] a, b, c;

    generate
        if (D_WIDTH > 2*D_WIDTH) begin
            always_comb begin
                {a, b} = c[2*D_WIDTH-1:0];
            end
        end
    endgenerate

endmodule
```

## Passing Code 2

`if` condition is inisde `always_comb`

```systemverilog
module t();

    localparam D_WIDTH = 16;
    logic [D_WIDTH-1:0] a, b, c;

    generate
        always_comb begin
            if (D_WIDTH > 2*D_WIDTH) begin
                a = c[0 +:D_WIDTH];
                b = c[D_WIDTH +:D_WIDTH];
            end
        end
    endgenerate

endmodule
```

### Failing Code 2
```systemverilog
module t();

    localparam D_WIDTH = 16;
    logic [D_WIDTH-1:0] a, b, c;

    generate
        always_comb begin
            if (D_WIDTH > 2*D_WIDTH) begin
                a = c[0 +:D_WIDTH];
                b = c[2*D_WIDTH-1 :D_WIDTH];
            end
        end
    endgenerate

endmodule
```
### Error 
```
%Warning-SELRANGE: /home/nndurj/Dev/OpenSource/cocotb_test/tests/../hdl/test.v:10: Selection index out of range: 31:16 outside 15:0
                                                                                 : ... In instance t
                b = c[2*D_WIDTH-1 :D_WIDTH];
                     ^
                   ... Use "/* verilator lint_off SELRANGE */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 warning(s)
```
